name: 05-06-design-audit-visual-polish
title: Design audit visual polish
description: Small frontend visual polish from the design audit: mobile discover filters, tavern owner roleplay console styling, and create wizard step cue.
creator: lijin
relatedFiles: docs/设计参考_视觉与角色评估.md
notes: Implemented scoped visual polish plus visitor-first tavern layout consolidation: mobile Discover is brighter, Tavern desktop no longer has a permanent right rail, secondary/public tools are folded under chat, and owner tools are folded + owner-gated with a bounded drawer. Verified with red/green static layout check, frontend build, focused scripts, and Chromium Playwright desktop/mobile self-acceptance.
